pi_items.source: Task description explicitly lists this as the required business rule name.
Task description explicitly lists 'network' and 'connectivity' as the required subject trigger keywords.
Task description explicitly lists 'High' as the required target priority action.
Task description explicitly requires setting category to 'Network', and setup_task.sh inserts this category into the DB.
Task description explicitly requires setting subcategory to 'Connectivity', and setup_task.sh inserts this subcategory into the DB.
Task description explicitly requires setting group to 'Network Support', and setup_task.sh inserts this group into the DB.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new business rule from scratch. Verified the expected rule name 'Auto-Route Network Issues', trigger keywords 'network' and 'connectivity', and the target actions (priority 'High', category 'Network', subcategory 'Connectivity', and group 'Network Support') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and are supported by the setup_task.sh prerequisite insertions.
